mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER (user_id, username, password, nickname, name, email, brith_date, address, phone, confirm_service, confirm_userinfo, confirm_event) VALUES (USER_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brith_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirm_service}, #{confirm_userinfo}, #{confirm_event})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM TBL_USER WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND is_selected = 1

SELECT * FROM tbl_user WHERE enable = 0 AND
last_login_date <= ADD_MONTH(SYSDATE, -12)
mapper.sql:
SELECT TBL_BOARD.user_id, TBL_BOARD.BOARD_ID AS BOARD_ID, TBL_BOARD.TITLE AS TITLE, NVL(TBL_USER.NICKNAME, '익명') AS AUTHOR,
NVL(TBL_BOARD.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS VIEW_COUNT, NVL(TBL_BOARD.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, NVL(TBL_BOARD.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS REPLY_CNT,
( SELECT MIN(TBL_BOARD_FILE.SAVED_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE WHERE TBL_BOARD_FILE.BOARD_ID = TBL_BOARD.BOARD_ID AND TBL_BOARD_FILE.IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' ) AS THUMB_SRC,
( SELECT LISTAGG(TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_ASPECT JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST ON TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = TBL_BOARD_ASPECT.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE TBL_BOARD_ASPECT.BOARD_ID = TBL_BOARD.BOARD_ID AND TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ) AS HASHTAGS
FROM TBL_BOARD JOIN TBL_USER ON TBL_USER.USER_ID = TBL_BOARD.USER_ID WHERE TBL_BOARD.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.profile_filename, u.nickname, u.name, u.brith_date, u.intro, u.phone, u.email, g.grade, h.hashtag_name, NVL(b.totalAnswers, 0) AS totalAnswers, NVL(b.totalViews, 0) AS totalViews, NVL(b.acceptedAnswers, 0) AS acceptedAnswers, pCard.BOARD_ID, pCard.TITLE, pCard.VIEW_COUNT, pCard.LIKE_COUNT, pCard.REPLY_CNT, pCard.THUMB_SRC, pCard.HASHTAGS FROM tbl_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_grade_list g ON u.grade_id = g.grade_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_user_aspect a ON u.user_id = a.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_hashtag_list h ON h.hashtag_id = a.hashtag_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN board_type = 'A' THEN 1 END) AS totalAnswers, SUM(view_count) AS totalViews, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_selected = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS acceptedAnswers FROM tbl_board GROUP BY user_id ) b ON u.user_id = b.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PC.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PC.BOARD_ID DESC) as rnum FROM (
) PC WHERE PC.USER_ID = #{user_id} -- PostsQuery 내부에 유저ID 컬럼이 있어야 함 ) WHERE rnum <= 5 ) pCard ON u.user_id = pCard.USER_ID WHERE u.user_id = #{user_id}
